properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 52/21

BARENTS SEA
1.THE NORWEGIAN AIRFORCE WILL CONDUCT AIRDROP OF CALIBRATION SPHERES BETWEEN 111000-111500 UTC MAY 21.
VESSELS ARE REQUESTED TO STAY OUTSIDE THE FOLLOWING DANGER AREA:

A. 70-43.5N 031-00.0E
B. 71-06.0N 031-00.0E
C. 71-06.0N 031-54.0E
D. 70-36.0N 031-54.0E 
E. 70-36.0N 031-24.0E
